$comment: Style guide as code. Every AI-generated asset is validated against this. Locked 2026-06-02. Reference: art/references/style_sample.png (TBD — captured during Milestone 0).
$character_palette_subset_comment: Used by all character sheets. Wider than per-character subsets so the same intake config works across the cast (red caps, blue jackets, green cloaks, gray robes, etc.) without per-character tweaking. EXCLUDES the Endesga pinks (#b55088, #f6757a, #68386c) so DALL-E shadow halos around red caps don't snap to halos.
$tile_palette_comment: Full Endesga 32 minus the pinks. Tilesets need way more color variety than characters — vegetation has green/orange/yellow/white, terrain has gray/brown/blue/tan — so we use the broad palette.

character_sheet_layouts.$comment: Generated at 8× scale (1024x480) so DALL-E/GPT-4o has detail headroom; intake downsamples to native 128x60. Layout: 5 rows × 4 cols, each cell 256×96 in the upscaled input (= 32×12 native) with the 128×96 (= 16×12 native) character centered with 64 px (= 8 native) of magenta padding on each side.

character_full_v3_upscaled.$comment: NO downsample. We palette-quantize and key magenta at the source resolution and slice frames at the source grid (5 rows x 4 cols). The result preserves every pixel of detail DALL-E drew. Frame dims aren't fixed — they're the per-character source cell size. The frontend renderer scales sprites to fit the visual scale (target ~24 px tall in display).

tileset_layouts.$comment: Tilesets and item sheets. Generated by ChatGPT at ~1024-1254 px square; we downsample to a sane native res so each output pixel = 1 game pixel at native zoom. Per-sprite rect catalogs (manifests) live in art/manifests/*.json and are built AFTER intake by hand or by an entity-extractor script.

tileset_grid_8x8.$comment: 8 cols × 8 rows of equal-size cells, each cell is one 16x16 sprite at native. Down-samples whole sheet to 128x128 native (= 8 cells × 16 px).

v2_building_freeform.$use_for: v2 single-asset buildings (blacksmith, town_hall, granary, watchtower, well, market_stall)
v2_building_freeform.$comment: Preserve source resolution. Palette-snap to the full tile palette. Magenta key. No grid — each sheet is a single building or one row of variants. Per-asset tight-crop happens AFTER intake via art/crop_building.py if needed.

v2_master_sheet_freeform.$use_for: v2 master sheets where sprites land in a grid but the grid is laid out by DALL-E (not the prompt). Preserve source resolution so the per-cell content-bbox slicer can find them. Slicing happens in art/slice_master_sheet.py after intake.

tileset_freeform_256.$comment: Mixed-size sprites in one sheet. Down-samples to 256x256 native (enough to hold a 16x16-tile footprint with detail). Per-sprite rectangles are catalogued in art/manifests/<name>.json AFTER intake.

tile_sheet_layout.$comment: Per-terrain 47-tile blob autotile (RPGMaker A2 style). Defined per terrain in art/prompts/tile_*.md.

intake_rules.$comment: If >5% of non-transparent pixels are off-palette, asset is rejected. <5% = auto-snap to nearest.
